flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at New Mexico Junior College rose 67% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.8k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at New Mexico Junior College fell 49% between 2006 and 2009 (35.1% → 17.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New Mexico Junior College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at New Mexico Junior College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (54.2% → 70.4%).
